snippet: School councils and ELV centres are not required to report allegations to the SSR or VDWC directly. Rather, school councils must instruct the principal, as the executive officer of the school council to notify CID as soon as possible after becoming aware of a reportable or notifiable allegation, so that the CID can assess the allegations and report them to the SSR or VDWC, if appropriate. In ELV centres the nominated supervisor is responsible for notifying CID.
